text:
In this chapter:

(1) “Board” means a district’s board of directors.

(2) “Commuter rail facility” means any property necessary for the transportation of passengers and baggage between locations in a district. The term includes rolling stock, locomotives, stations, parking areas, and rail lines.

(2-a) “Commuter rail service” means the transportation of passengers and baggage by rail between locations in a district.

(3) “Creating municipality” means a municipality described by Section 173.051 (Creation of District) (a).

(4) “Director” means a board member.

(5) “District” means an intermunicipal commuter rail district created under this chapter or under Article 6550c-1, Revised Statutes, as that article existed before April 1, 2011.

(6) “District property” means property the district owns or leases under a long-term lease.

(7) “System” means all of the commuter rail and intermodal facilities leased or owned by or operated on behalf of a district.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 5
### Chapter 173. Intermunicipal Commuter Rail Districts
##### § 173.002 — Definitions

In this chapter:

    (1) “Board” means a district’s board of directors.

    (2) “Commuter rail facility” means any property necessary for the transportation of passengers and baggage between locations in a district. The term includes rolling stock, locomotives, stations, parking areas, and rail lines.

    (2-a) “Commuter rail service” means the transportation of passengers and baggage by rail between locations in a district.

    (3) “Creating municipality” means a municipality described by Section 173.051 (Creation of District) (a).

    (4) “Director” means a board member.

    (5) “District” means an intermunicipal commuter rail district created under this chapter or under Article 6550c-1, Revised Statutes, as that article existed before April 1, 2011.

    (6) “District property” means property the district owns or leases under a long-term lease.

    (7) “System” means all of the commuter rail and intermodal facilities leased or owned by or operated on behalf of a district.

*Acts 2011, 82nd Leg., R.S., Ch. 1307 (H.B.3030), Sec. 1, eff. September 1, 2011.*

subsections.text: “Board” means a district’s board of directors.

“Commuter rail facility” means any property necessary for the transportation of passengers and baggage between locations in a district. The term includes rolling stock, locomotives, stations, parking areas, and rail lines.

subsections.label: 2-a
subsections.text: “Commuter rail service” means the transportation of passengers and baggage by rail between locations in a district.
“Creating municipality” means a municipality described by Section 173.051 (Creation of District) (a).
“District” means an intermunicipal commuter rail district created under this chapter or under Article 6550c-1, Revised Statutes, as that article existed before April 1, 2011.
“District property” means property the district owns or leases under a long-term lease.
“System” means all of the commuter rail and intermodal facilities leased or owned by or operated on behalf of a district.
